title: Metabolomics of Arterial Stiffness.
author: Paapstel K Kals J
content: S-EPMC9146333 PMC9146333 Metabolomics of Arterial Stiffness. Arterial stiffness (AS) is one of the earliest detectable signs of structural and functional alterations of the vessel wall and an independent predictor of cardiovascular events and death. The emerging field of metabolomics can
